details.purpose: Fund pending acquisition of Playa Hotels & Resorts N.V.
details.ranking: Unsecured, unsubordinated; not guaranteed by subsidiaries

findings.significance_for_franchisees: Parent company Hyatt Hotels Corporation issued $1B in new debt to fund Playa Hotels acquisition. Notes are not obligations of subsidiaries (including franchisor). Adds leverage to parent balance sheet but also expands portfolio through Playa acquisition.
